title: Heterogeneous Computing Pipeline for Stream Compression
description: Engineered a custom FPGA kernel, CPU NEON intrinsics, and modified lookup table for hardware-level synthesis achieving state-of-the-art 135 Mbps per-thread throughput, horizontally scalable by number of cores and FPGA synthesis real estate.
highlights: Lempel-Ziv-Welch custom kernel developed for FPGA synthesis
Content-defined chunking (Gear hash table) with CPU NEON intrinsics
NEON-accelerated SHA-256 on CPU
C++ OpenCL kernel host programming for pipeline control with data-flow parallelism
Achieved 135 Mbps per-thread throughput — limited only by number of cores and kernel synthesis real estate

title: Autonomous F1/10th Robot Racer Agent — High Performance
description: Full-stack autonomous racing system on the F1Tenth platform with LiDAR, depth camera, PWM controllers (VESC) on NVIDIA Jetson using ROS. Placed 2nd in University Competition.
highlights: Interfaced LiDAR, depth camera, PWM controllers (VESC) on NVIDIA Jetson using ROS
Localization, navigation, sensing, RL, MPC, SLAM, Particle Filtering, Pure Pursuit — 2nd Rank University Competition
NeRF-based 3D perception for localization and path planning POC using scene reconstruction
Kinematic models using Cardan angles, curvature controllers, Kalman Filters, Markovian and optimization algorithms
Middleware: scheduling for real-time systems, inter-process communication, and OS abstractions

title: Agentic AI Manager — Cross-Model Communication & Scaling (Akka)
description: Built an Akka Actor system for multimodal scale-up, inter-model communication, and empowering ML models with functional programming tools using Scala. Light Bend Akka challenge 2025.
highlights: Akka Actor system manager for multimodal scale-up and inter-model communication
Agent selector, load balancing, and actor-based asynchronous communication message protocol
Demonstrated power of functional programming (Scala) in building modular frameworks for agentic abilities
Manages clusters of various ML models for building cyber-intelligent systems achieving meaningful automation

title: RISC-V Microprocessor on Lattice FPGA
description: Built a RISC-V ISA-compliant microprocessor with multicycle, 5-stage pipelining, and a custom 8-stage Divider Module at University of Pennsylvania. Achieved 17.65 MHz clock speed with AXI4-Lite cache.
highlights: RISC-V ISA-compliant microprocessor with multicycle and 5-stage pipelining
Custom 8-stage Divider Module for optimizing DIV instructions
Achieved 17.65 MHz clock speed with 4-stage AXI4-Lite cache
Implemented on Lattice FPGA

title: Low-Light Image Enhancement using Transformer-Based Neural Network
description: Based on RetinexFormer, a transformer-based model with modified loss criterion achieving PSNR 22.7 and live video enhancement at 5 FPS. Further accelerated via quantization, pruning, and GPU acceleration.
highlights: Based on RetinexFormer transformer model with modifications to loss criterion
Achieved PSNR of 22.7 and live video enhancement at 5 FPS
Further accelerated using quantization, pruning, and vertical GPU acceleration (high-performance computing)

title: Deep Neural Network Model Compression using CSR
description: Engineered custom sparse linear layer and implemented model pruning, quantization, and hard pruning techniques to compress large-scale DNNs. Achieved 75% memory reduction in VGG16 (500+MB to 277MB).
highlights: Custom sparse linear layer with model pruning, quantization, and hard pruning to compress large-scale DNNs
75% reduction in memory footprint of VGG16 (500+MB to 277MB) while preserving inference accuracy
Enables deployment on constrained edge platforms
Comparative benchmarking: Apple Metal Performance Shaders (MPS) vs NVIDIA CUDA — throughput, latency, and portability

title: NSC Portfolio
description: A personal portfolio website built with React and Vite to showcase research, projects, and experience. Features dynamic JSON-driven content, media embeddings, and a responsive dark-theme design.
highlights: JSON-driven dynamic content — swap data without touching components
Video and photo media per item
Responsive dark-theme design
Resume download and social links
